text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Patient in ER for dog bite (small size, animal of unknown person) laterally to the left knee.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Incident occurred yesterday.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Superficial signs of the bite visible on examination, no edema, no redness.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Pain exacerbated by knee movements.", 0.0, 0.5)
